Interpretation warnings

SHARPE_ANNUALIZATIONSharpe and Sortino use daily equity returns annualized with sqrt(252); bar timeframe is 1m.
SHORT_BACKTEST_PERIODTotal return covers about 13 calendar days — avoid CAGR-style interpretation on short samples.
DRAWDOWN_WITHOUT_DURATIONMax drawdown is shown without underwater duration; use the drawdown curve for timing context.
COST_ASSUMPTIONSTotal costs reflect persisted commission fields only; verify slippage and fill assumptions in the run manifest fingerprint.
